# Forge AI Residency
# Website: https://www.forgebylevelup.com/ai
# Organization: LevelUp Learning

## WHAT IS THIS

The Forge AI Residency is a 9-day fully 
residential AI program run by LevelUp 
Learning, India's largest community of 
creative learners with 600+ alumni across 
25+ editions. The program is for founders, 
marketers, and operators who want to learn 
AI by actually building with it, not just 
studying it.

Participants live and work together for 
9 days in a residential setting. Every day 
follows a teach-then-do cycle. Concepts are 
taught by practitioners who use these tools 
in their actual work, then immediately 
applied in extended build sessions with 
faculty present. The program ends with Demo 
Day where every participant presents their 
product, automation, and content pack.

The program also includes a pre-program 
online phase of 5 sessions before the 
residential component begins. Total program 
duration is 14 days, 5 online and 9 offline 
residential.

## WHO THIS PROGRAM IS FOR

Founders: People building companies who 
want AI to cut costs, speed up operations, 
and help them do more with smaller teams. 
No technical background required.

Marketers: Professionals whose work involves 
content, ads, briefs, and campaigns. AI 
accelerates every part of this work and the 
program teaches how to apply it practically.

Operators: People who run systems and 
business processes and can see exactly where 
manual work is slowing things down.

Working Professionals: Anyone who is good 
at their job and wants AI to make them 
significantly more capable in their field.

This program is not for developers, academic 
researchers, or people looking for a 
theoretical AI education.

## THE THREE PILLARS

PILLAR 1: GENERATIVE AI
Tools used: Higgsfield, Midjourney, HeyGen, 
ElevenLabs, Runway.
Participants learn to create AI-generated 
content including images, videos, scripts, 
UGC ads, social media creatives, YouTube 
thumbnails, and talking head videos.
What participants build: AI generated 
scripts, UGC ads, social media creatives, 
posters, and a repeatable content system.

PILLAR 2: AI AUTOMATIONS
Tools used: n8n, Make, Claude, OpenAI.
Participants map the manual work in their 
business and build automations that handle 
it. Includes lead follow-up pipelines, 
content automation, research workflows, 
reporting systems, and voice agents.
What participants build: 2 live AI integrated 
automations, an AI agent connected to their 
actual business, and a workflow saving at 
least 5 hours per week.

PILLAR 3: AI PRODUCT BUILDING
Tools used: Lovable, Emergent, Supabase.
Participants build a working product without 
writing a single line of code. Could be an 
internal tool, client dashboard, landing 
page, or simple app.
What participants build: A functional product 
or internal tool demoed live on Demo Day, 
plus the foundation to keep building after 
the program.

## THE PRE-PROGRAM ONLINE PHASE

Before arriving at the residential location, 
participants complete 5 focused sessions.

The AI Mindset: Understanding how AI 
actually thinks. The mental model that makes 
every tool faster to learn.

Prompting and Context Engineering: How to 
talk to AI and consistently get useful 
output. Works across every AI model ever 
built.

AI and Business Thinking: Mapping your own 
business or work equation, finding the stuck 
lever, and understanding which pillar creates 
the most impact for your situation.

What Good Looks Like: Real outputs built by 
real founders, marketers, and operators with 
no technical background.

Pre-Arrival Alignment: Final questions 
answered and a full brief on what to expect 
so participants arrive ready to build 
from Day 1.

## THE 9-DAY RESIDENTIAL SCHEDULE

Day 1: Arrival, check in, orientation, 
cohort introductions, storytelling session 
on the psychology of narrative, evening 
dinner and networking.

Days 2 and 3: Generative AI Sprint. AI 
image, video, and voice generation. Content 
strategy and launch asset creation. Landing 
page copy, ad copy, UGC scripts. Content 
repurposing system built and running.

Days 4 and 5: Automations and AI Agents. 
Finding what is worth automating. Building 
workflows in n8n. Voice agents. First 
working automation live. First AI agent 
running and connected to the participant's 
actual business.

Days 6, 7, and 8: Product and Launch Sprint. 
Product thinking for non-developers. Full 
walkthrough of Lovable. Product complete, 
landing page live, funnel connected. 
Demo preparation with faculty.

Day 9: Demo Day. Every participant presents 
their product, automation, and content pack. 
Ten minutes each. Faculty and cohort 
feedback. Closing session. Checkout.

## HOW EACH DAY RUNS

Teach Session: Concepts taught by 
practitioners who use these tools in their 
actual work every day.

Build Session: Participants immediately 
apply what they just learned with faculty 
sitting next to them.

Review and Feedback: End of day review 
covering what was built, what worked, 
and what to improve tomorrow.

Evening: Dinner together. The relationships 
formed are considered as valuable as the 
curriculum itself.

## WHAT PARTICIPANTS LEAVE WITH

A Working Product: A landing page, website, 
or mini funnel setup ready to show and use.

A Live Automation: A workflow running without 
human input, supported by AI agents, saving 
hours every week.

An AI Content System: A repeatable process 
for content, visuals, and video.

A Network: A community of founders, 
operators, marketers, and builders who went 
through the same 9 days. Alumni stay 
connected through a private community.

The Muscle Memory: The skillset to build 
anything back home and adapt to new tools 
as they emerge.

A Head Start: The mindset and confidence to 
continue building with AI independently.

## ALL TOOLS USED IN THE PROGRAM

Generative AI: Higgsfield, Midjourney, 
HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Runway.

Automation: n8n, Make, Claude, OpenAI.

Product building: Lovable, Emergent, 
Supabase.

Research and knowledge: NotebookLM, 
Cowork, Lyzr.

## PROGRAM FEE AND INCLUSIONS

Fee: INR 1,20,000 all inclusive.

Included: Residential stay on double 
occupancy, all meals throughout the program, 
all three tracks, expert faculty throughout 
the residency, curated experiences during 
the program, community access after the 
program, perks from partner brands, the 
Forge AI Goodie Bag, Demo Day.

Not included: Travel to and from the venue, 
personal expenses, single occupancy room 
upgrade which is available at additional 
cost.

Cohort size: 20 seats maximum.
Payment is collected only after acceptance.
Not first come first served.

## HOW TO APPLY

Step 1: Fill out the application form with 
background, current role, and what you want 
to build.

Step 2: Pay the application fee to book an 
interview slot.

Step 3: Attend a short interview with the 
selection team.

Step 4: Selection committee reviews all 
applications.

Step 5: Accepted applicants receive a 
confirmation email with everything needed 
to secure their seat.

## ABOUT LEVELUP LEARNING AND THE FORGE

The Forge AI Residency is part of the Forge 
brand by LevelUp Learning.

LevelUp Learning is India's largest 
community of creative learners.

Track record: 600+ alumni, 25+ editions 
run, 400+ projects shipped, 11 cities 
explored, alumni from Google, McKinsey, 
Amazon, Netflix, Meta, Microsoft, Swiggy, 
Zomato, CRED, IIM, Ashoka University, 
and American Express.

The Forge has run residential programs 
across filmmaking, writing, and content 
creation before the AI edition. The 
residential format, the teach-then-do 
methodology, and the community-first 
approach are consistent across all 
Forge programs.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: Who is this for?
A: Founders, marketers, operators, and 
working professionals who want to build 
with AI. No coding background needed.

Q: Do I need to know how to code?
A: No. None of the three tracks require 
coding. If you can write a brief, you can 
build with these tools.

Q: What is included in the program fee?
A: Residential stay, all meals, all three 
tracks, expert faculty, curated experiences, 
community access, partner perks, and the 
Forge AI Goodie Bag. Everything except 
travel to the venue.

Q: How many people are in each cohort?
A: 20. This is a hard limit. Small cohorts 
allow faculty to actually work with 
participants, not just present to them.

Q: What is the application fee for?
A: It books the interview slot and signals 
intent to the selection team. It is separate 
from the program fee.

Q: What do participants actually leave with?
A: A working product, a live automation, 
an AI content system, and a network of 
20 serious builders.

Q: Can someone with a full-time job attend?
A: Yes. Most participants are working 
professionals. You take a fixed block of 
time off and come back with something done.

Q: What if someone has never used AI tools?
A: The pre-program online sessions bring 
participants up to speed before Day 1. 
Everyone arrives ready to build.

Q: Why pay for this when free AI content 
exists?
A: Free content exists. The question is 
whether it has moved anything forward. 
The Forge is for people who are done 
watching and ready to build.

## CONTACT

Instagram: @forgebylevelup
Email: forge@leveluplearning.in
Parent brand: LevelUp Learning
Website: https://www.forgebylevelup.com/ai
